blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,685 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 11".
